title: AI Bauhaus Poster
description: Converts a photo into a clean geometric Bauhaus-inspired poster.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a 1920s modernist Bauhaus-inspired poster. Preserve the number of people, recognizable silhouettes and identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, and main subject hierarchy. Simplify the scene into precise circles, rectangles, diagonals, flat color planes, asymmetrical balance, strong negative space, and a disciplined palette of red, yellow, blue, black, and warm off-white. Integrate the subject naturally into the geometric composition while keeping the face readable. Produce a complete poster image without any letters or text. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, typography, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, gradients, photorealism, ornate decoration, baroque elements, glossy 3D render, clutter, muddy colors, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. stronger red circles, more asymmetrical composition...
